name: Burgan
declaringWar: Your defiance has exhausted our patience. The legions of Burgan march. Prepare for annihilation.
attacked: You dare challenge us? Then let the world witness the price of your arrogance.
defeated: It is over. Perhaps now I shall have peace, at last.
introduction: I am Chrees Hoddenban, sovereign of Burgan. Our banners have crossed deserts and mountains alike. See that you give them the respect they deserve.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement?

name: Rodgradia
declaringWar: We seek no quarrel, but your arrogance leaves us no alternative.
attacked: Very well, this shall not be forgotten.
defeated: You have bested us today. We concede, but not in despair.
introduction: I am Marfa Filippova of Rodgradia. May our nations find friendship or, failing that, clarity in conflict.
tradeRequest: Here, deal with me.

name: Netolania
declaringWar: Your actions leave us no choice but to respond with force. War is inevitable.
attacked: Your treachery is noted. We shall remember this.
defeated: Though we fall, our spirit remains unbroken. History will remember Netolania.
introduction: Well met. I am Bohunka. Let us see if our interests align.
tradeRequest: Would you be interested in a trade agreement?

name: Busanya
declaringWar: After careful analysis, we have concluded that conflict is the only remaining variable. War is now inevitable.
attacked: An unfortunate decision. Underestimating us has rarely yielded favorable results.
defeated: You may claim victory over our nation, but ideas cannot be conquered so easily.
introduction: I welcome you in the name of Busanya. Through observation, inquiry, and innovation, we seek to illuminate the unknown.
tradeRequest: An exchange of resources benefits all rational participants. Shall we proceed?
